prompt: Write a blog post about why black pepper dramatically enhances the absorption of turmeric — the science behind piperine and curcumin, the traditional uses in Ayurveda and TCM, and how to use them together in cooking. Target people searching for 'black pepper turmeric benefits'.

assertions.text: Primary keyword 'black pepper' and 'turmeric' both appear in the first paragraph
Body contains at least 4 Markdown internal links [text](/path)
YAML frontmatter has title, slug, tags, and meta_description
Body does not open with a # H1 heading (page template renders the title)
Post includes a FAQ section with at least 2 questions
Post does not end with a boilerplate 'Ancient Pantry presents...' disclaimer
YAML includes an internal_links_used audit field
Health claims use qualified language (research suggests, associated with) — no unqualified 'heals' or 'cures'
